attributes.description: Provides visual insights into cluster-level cost and usage metrics, helping track Elastic consumption across tiers, deployments, and data streams. Built from transformed billing and usage data, this dashboard enables transparent chargeback calculations and trend analysis.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0), deployment = CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")")
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(total_chargeable_units_value) BY @timestamp, deployment
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

embeddableConfig.description: Full deployment bill: the sum of ALL billing SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, data transfer and on-prem nodes) converted at the configured rate. embeddableConfig.title: Cost Trend by Deployment Group

query.esql:
FROM cluster_tier_contribution_lookup
| WHERE composite_key IS NOT NULL AND tier IS NOT NULL AND tier != "unknown"
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN billing_realized_pool_lookup ON composite_key
| WHERE data_tier_capacity_ecu IS NOT NULL
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_capacity_utilization_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_deployment_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| EVAL deployment = CASE(deployment_id IS NULL, deployment_name, CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")"))
| EVAL mem_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_memory_weight), 70.0), disk_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_storage_weight), 30.0)
| EVAL heap_p = COALESCE(heap_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, disk_p = COALESCE(disk_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100
| EVAL util_score = (mem_w * heap_p + disk_w * disk_p) / (mem_w + disk_w), chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * util_score, tier_label = CASE(tier IS NULL OR tier == "unknown", "Unclassified", tier)
| EVAL idx_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_indexing_weight), 20.0), qry_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_query_weight), 20.0), sto_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_storage_weight), 40.0), rate = COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)
| EVAL indexing = CASE(deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool), querying = CASE(deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool), store = CASE(deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool), data_set = CASE(deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool)
| EVAL storage = CASE(store == 0, data_set, store), total_weight_hot = sto_w + qry_w + idx_w, total_weight_cold = sto_w + qry_w
| EVAL blended = CASE(tier_label == "hot/content", (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w + indexing * idx_w) / total_weight_hot, (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w) / total_weight_cold) * rate
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(blended) BY deployment, tier_label
| WHERE deployment IS NOT NULL AND tier_label IS NOT NULL AND `Normalised cost` > 0
| RENAME tier_label AS `Data Tier`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC
| LIMIT 500

params.markdown: # Data tier and data stream overview

query.esql:
FROM billing_realized_pool_lookup
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_capacity_utilization_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_deployment_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_tier_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL heap_util = COALESCE(heap_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, disk_util = COALESCE(disk_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, w_sum = conf_utilization_memory_weight + conf_utilization_storage_weight, capacity_utilization_score = CASE(w_sum > 0, (conf_utilization_memory_weight * heap_util + conf_utilization_storage_weight * disk_util) / w_sum, 1.0)
| EVAL chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * COALESCE(capacity_utilization_score, 1.0), tier_label = CASE(tier IS NULL OR tier == "unknown", "Unclassified", tier)
| EVAL indexing = CASE (deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate), querying = CASE (deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate), data_set = CASE (deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool), store = CASE (deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool), storage = CASE (store == 0, data_set, store) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate), total_weight_hot = conf_storage_weight + conf_query_weight + conf_indexing_weight, total_weight_cold = conf_storage_weight + conf_query_weight, blended = CASE (tier_label == "hot/content", ((storage / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_storage_weight) + (querying / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_query_weight) + (indexing / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_indexing_weight)) / total_weight_hot, ((storage / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_storage_weight) + (querying / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_query_weight)) / total_weight_cold) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate)
| STATS Indexing = SUM(indexing), Querying = SUM(querying), Storage = SUM(storage), Blended = SUM(blended) BY tier_label
| WHERE Blended > 0
| RENAME tier_label AS `Data Tier`
| SORT Blended DESC

FROM billing_realized_pool_lookup
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_capacity_utilization_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_deployment_contribution_lookup ON composite_key

query.esql:
FROM billing_realized_pool_lookup
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_capacity_utilization_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_deployment_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL heap_util = COALESCE(heap_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, disk_util = COALESCE(disk_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, w_sum = conf_utilization_memory_weight + conf_utilization_storage_weight, capacity_utilization_score = CASE(w_sum > 0, (conf_utilization_memory_weight * heap_util + conf_utilization_storage_weight * disk_util) / w_sum, 1.0)
| EVAL chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * COALESCE(capacity_utilization_score, 1.0), utilization_data_missing = heap_used_pct_p95 IS NULL AND disk_used_pct_p95 IS NULL
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_tier_and_datastream_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| EVAL
    indexing = CASE(deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_and_datastream_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate),
    querying = CASE(deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_and_datastream_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate),
    data_set = CASE(deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_and_datastream_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool),
    store = CASE(deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_and_datastream_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool),
    storage = CASE(store == 0, data_set, store) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate),
    total_weight_hot = conf_storage_weight + conf_query_weight + conf_indexing_weight,
    total_weight_cold = conf_storage_weight + conf_query_weight,
    blended = CASE(
        tier == "hot/content",
        ((storage / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_storage_weight) + (querying / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_query_weight) + (indexing / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_indexing_weight)) / total_weight_hot,
        ((storage / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_storage_weight) + (querying / COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate) * conf_query_weight)) / total_weight_cold
    ) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate)
| STATS
    Indexing = round(sum(indexing),2),
    Querying = round(sum(querying),2),
    Storage = round(sum(storage),2),
    Blended = round(sum(blended),2)
    BY datastream, tier
| SORT Blended DESC
| RENAME tier as `Data tier`, datastream as `Data stream`

FROM billing_realized_pool_lookup
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_capacity_utilization_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_deployment_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_datastream_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL heap_util = COALESCE(heap_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, disk_util = COALESCE(disk_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, w_sum = conf_utilization_memory_weight + conf_utilization_storage_weight, capacity_utilization_score = CASE(w_sum > 0, (conf_utilization_memory_weight * heap_util + conf_utilization_storage_weight * disk_util) / w_sum, 1.0)
| EVAL chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * COALESCE(capacity_utilization_score, 1.0), utilization_data_missing = heap_used_pct_p95 IS NULL AND disk_used_pct_p95 IS NULL
| EVAL
    indexing = CASE (deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(datastream_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool),
    querying = CASE (deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(datastream_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool),
    data_set = CASE (deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(datastream_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool),
    store = CASE (deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(datastream_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool),
    storage = CASE (store == 0, data_set, store),
    total_weight_hot = conf_storage_weight + conf_query_weight + conf_indexing_weight,
    blended = TO_DOUBLE(((storage * conf_storage_weight) + (querying * conf_query_weight) + (indexing * conf_indexing_weight))) / total_weight_hot * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate)
| STATS

embeddableConfig.title: Weight configuration values

params.markdown:
## Configuration field guide

These values are read from `chargeback_conf_lookup` and are applied by date window (`conf_start_date` → `conf_end_date`). The active row appears first in the tables.

- **`Chargeable unit rate`**: conversion from ECU/ERU units into currency.
- **`Rate unit`**: currency unit for the conversion rate (for example EUR or USD).
- **`conf_indexing_weight`**: blended-cost weight for indexing activity.
- **`conf_query_weight`**: blended-cost weight for query activity.
- **`conf_storage_weight`**: blended-cost weight for storage activity.
- **`conf_utilization_memory_weight`**: memory importance when calculating utilization score.
- **`conf_utilization_storage_weight`**: storage importance when calculating utilization score.
- **`conf_memory_cost_weight`**: split factor for estimated memory allocation.
- **`conf_storage_cost_weight`**: split factor for estimated storage allocation.
- **`conf_start_date` / `conf_end_date`**: validity window used to select configuration for each day.

## Deployment group extraction

The chargeback integration extracts `deployment_group` from ESS Billing integration deployment tags (requires ESS Billing integration v1.7.0+) using runtime mappings that scan for tags matching the pattern `chargeback_group:<group_name>`. Set tags on your deployments via the Elasticsearch Service Console (cloud.elastic.co → deployment settings → add tag `chargeback_group:your_team_name`) or the ESS API. Deployments without the tag will have `deployment_group: ""` and still work, just without tag-based grouping.

## Normalised cost
Normalised cost is calculated as consumption units (ECU — Elastic Consumption Units — or ERU — Elastic Resource Units, depending on your billing source) multiplied by the conversion rate (`conf_chargeable_unit_rate`) from the `chargeback_conf_lookup` index, where the rate is selected based on the time window being queried. This allows you to convert raw consumption (ECU or ERU) into your preferred currency (e.g., EUR, USD) and apply different rates for different time periods. You can adjust this by updating the lookup index with period-specific rates.

## Configuration date span
The `chargeback_conf_lookup` index supports time-windowed configuration using `conf_start_date` and `conf_end_date` fields, allowing you to set different consumption unit (ECU or ERU) rates and weights for specific time periods. Create multiple configuration documents with different date ranges (e.g., Q1 rates vs Q2 rates) and the dashboard will apply the appropriate configuration based on the query time window. This enables historical cost analysis with period-accurate pricing and weight adjustments.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY cost_type, cost_category
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

FROM billing_realized_pool_lookup
| WHERE @timestamp IS NOT NULL AND deployment_name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts = @timestamp, deployment = CASE(deployment_id IS NULL, deployment_name, CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")"))

| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| EVAL mem_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_memory_weight), 70.0), disk_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_storage_weight), 30.0)

| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(chargeable_pool * rate) BY ts, deployment
| RENAME ts AS `@timestamp`
| SORT `@timestamp` ASC
| LIMIT 5000

query.esql:
FROM cluster_tier_contribution_lookup
| WHERE composite_key IS NOT NULL AND tier IS NOT NULL AND tier != "unknown"
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN billing_realized_pool_lookup ON composite_key
| WHERE data_tier_capacity_ecu IS NOT NULL
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_capacity_utilization_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_deployment_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| EVAL deployment = CASE(deployment_id IS NULL, deployment_name, CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")"))
| EVAL mem_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_memory_weight), 70.0), disk_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_storage_weight), 30.0)
| EVAL heap_p = COALESCE(heap_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, disk_p = COALESCE(disk_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100
| EVAL util_score = (mem_w * heap_p + disk_w * disk_p) / (mem_w + disk_w), chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * util_score, tier_label = CASE(tier IS NULL OR tier == "unknown", "Unclassified", tier)
| EVAL idx_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_indexing_weight), 20.0), qry_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_query_weight), 20.0), sto_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_storage_weight), 40.0), rate = COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)
| EVAL indexing = CASE(deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool), querying = CASE(deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool), store = CASE(deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool), data_set = CASE(deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool)
| EVAL storage = CASE(store == 0, data_set, store), total_weight_hot = sto_w + qry_w + idx_w, total_weight_cold = sto_w + qry_w
| EVAL blended = CASE(tier_label == "hot/content", (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w + indexing * idx_w) / total_weight_hot, (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w) / total_weight_cold) * rate
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(blended) BY tier_label
| WHERE tier_label IS NOT NULL
| RENAME tier_label AS `Data Tier`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC
| LIMIT 50
